summary: Tested Hintalaskuri page with DynamicServicePage sections. All features working correctly: Hero, Calculator wizard, Trust Badges, Description section, Features section (4 service cards), Why Choose Us section (6 items), Process section (4 steps), Service Areas section, Contact form, Related Services, Strong CTA, and Footer. No regression on existing service pages.
passed_tests: API /api/service-pages/hintalaskuri returns page data with all required fields
Hintalaskuri page has description_title and description_text (substantial content)
Hintalaskuri page has 4 features (Sisämaalaus, Tasoitustyöt, Julkisivumaalaus, Mikrosementti)
Hintalaskuri page has 6 why_items
Hintalaskuri page has process settings (use_global_process: true)
Hintalaskuri page has CTA section
Existing service page /maalaustyot-helsinki still works (no regression)
API /api/service-pages returns 7 pages including hintalaskuri
FAQs endpoint works for hintalaskuri (returns 0 as expected)
Admin can see hintalaskuri in service pages list
Calculator config endpoint still works (6 services)
Frontend: Hero section loads with data-testid='price-calculator-page'
Frontend: Calculator title 'Laske hinta-arvio hetkessä' displayed
Frontend: 4 trust badges visible
Frontend: Service selection grid with 6 service cards
Frontend: Progress bar visible after service selection
Frontend: Calculator wizard navigation works (Next/Back buttons)
Frontend: Area slider visible and functional
Frontend: Live price box shows estimated price with kotitalousvähennys
Frontend: Description section (PALVELUN KUVAUS) renders below calculator
Frontend: Features section (PALVELUN SISÄLTÖ) renders with 4 cards
Frontend: Why Choose section (MIKSI MEIDÄT) renders
Frontend: Process section (TYÖVAIHEET) renders
Frontend: Service Areas section (TOIMIALUE) renders
Frontend: Contact form section (OTA YHTEYTTÄ) renders
Frontend: Related Services section (MUUT PALVELUT) renders
Frontend: Strong CTA section ('Valmis aloittamaan projektin?') renders
Frontend: Footer renders correctly
Admin panel: Login works with admin/jbadmin2024
Admin panel: Palvelusivut tab shows hintalaskuri page
critical_code_review_comments: Implementation is clean - DynamicServicePage exports named components that PriceCalculatorPage imports and uses
seed_hintalaskuri_page() function correctly creates the page on startup if not exists
All section components (TrustBadges, DescriptionSection, FeaturesSection, etc.) are properly exported and imported
seed_data_creation: Hintalaskuri service page auto-seeded on startup with description, features, why_items, and CTA content
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 tested the new Hintalaskuri page with DynamicServicePage sections. All features work correctly. The page has: Hero with calculator wizard, Trust Badges, Description section with rich text about pricing, Features section with 4 service category cards, Why Choose Us section with 6 items, Process section with 4 steps, Service Areas section, Contact form, Related Services, Strong CTA, and Footer. No FAQs exist for hintalaskuri yet (service_id=hintalaskuri returns 0 FAQs). Admin can edit the page via /admin > Palvelusivut.
